name: Zuppa Inglese Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature at least an hour before baking.
2. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Add sugar, lemon juice, orange rind, and sherry (or almond extract) to the yolks. Mix until foamy.
4. Sift flour three times and gently fold into the egg yolk mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until foamy, then add salt. Continue beating until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the egg whites into the yolk mixture.
7. Pour batter into an ungreased 9-inch springform pan.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a test with a finger tip shows the cake springs back immediately when pressed.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan.
10. Invert the cake onto a wire rack and remove from the pan once thoroughly cooled.
11. Cut into 4 layers.
12. Fill between layers with custard filling.
13. Spread sweetened whipped cream over the top and sides of the cake, and sprinkle with candied fruit.
14. Serve immediately.
